title: January Dividend Kings And Princes: 3 Buys And 2 To Watch
text: "There is only one-criterion to be included among the Dividend Kings: a publicly-traded company must increase its total fiscal-year dividend-payout for a minimum of 50 consecutive-years." - Dogs of the Dow. The 41 Dividend Kings and 2 Princes (next in line for kingship) (K&P) screened as of December 28, 2022, represented ten of eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker targeted-top-ten net-gainers ranged 9.61%-20.75%.

title: 3 Dividend Kings Nicely Suited for Income Investors
text: Dividend Aristocrats, companies that have increased their dividend payouts for at least 25 consecutive years, are popular targets among income investors. However, a step above is the elite Dividend Kings group.

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For January 2023
text: NOBL gained 7.12% in November, which brings the Fund's return for the year to a loss of 2.14%. Thus far this month, through December 23rd, the dividend aristocrat ETF is down 3.47%, bringing its year-to-date return to -5.86%.
